name: Kubernetes Rolebinding Modification
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: kelnage
SIGMA Title: Kubernetes Rolebinding Modification
SIGMA Description: Detects when a Kubernetes Rolebinding is created or modified.


False positives:
- Modifying a Kubernetes Rolebinding may need to be done by a system administrator.
- Automated processes may need to take these actions and may need to be filtered.

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%rbac.authorization.k8s.io%' AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%clusterrolebindings%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%rolebindings%') AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%create%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%delete%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%patch%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%replace%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%update%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Kubernetes Rolebinding Modification on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%rbac.authorization.k8s.io%' AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%clusterrolebindings%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%rolebindings%') AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%create%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%delete%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%patch%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%replace%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%update%') AQL filter query
